title: Factor Combinations
explanation: Backtracking problem to find all distinct factor combinations. Start with factor 2 up to sqrt(n). If n is divisible, recurse.

boilerplate.java: public class Main { public static void main(String[] args) {} }
boilerplate.javascript: const fs = require('fs'); const input = fs.readFileSync(0, 'utf-8').trim().split('\\n');

question_text:
Factor Combinations

Return all possible combinations of factors of a positive integer n.
